reviews.review_description: I'm so glad to have run across this app.  I like a good game as much as the next person, but love solid experiences like this.  In some ways this is even better and useful than the real thing, with the added bonus of the remains of the original building.  Really solid application.

developer_response.body: What a fantastic review!  We are so glad you enjoyed the app.

reviews.review_description: Really wonderful app.  I was delighted to see you can actually "play" on the upright piano (I'm a pianist). As a suggestion, it would be great to have free locomotion in addition to teleport.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review.  We are thrilled that you discovered that the piano works and that you enjoy our app.  I will send your suggestion to our developers for future updates.

reviews.review_description: I remember visiting the Lanier Byzantine Chapel in-person for a lecture and this is an excellent recreation of it. Not only do I feel like i'm there, I now have an opportunity to learn and appreciate more about the Chapel than I would have had time to in-person thanks to this app. I highly recommend this experience!

developer_response.body: Hi ArmaniXR, we are thrilled to know from someone who has visited the Lanier Chapel in-person that this is an accurate recreation. Thank you for visiting and for your review!

reviews.review_description: Visuals and idea is amazing! Thank you so much for creating this beautiful experience!

developer_response.body: Hi Brigitta, thank you for taking a tour of the Lanier Stone Chapel and leaving a review. We are glad you enjoyed your time visiting the chapel and hope you come back again soon!
